description: This pipeline processes images by first importing them and then applying various operations such as filtering, annotating, and correcting, followed by splitting and projecting the data to produce a final output, ultimately generating an annotated image with improved quality and extracted features.

c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.name: ij1-dimensions-hyper-stacksplitter
c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.description: Splits a hyperstack by a selected dimension into a single or multiple output slots. Multiple output slots can be utilized to split specific indices.

47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.name: image-properties-to-annotation
47c49164-bed6-4aef-87b5-36f5473a4b21.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.name: path-filter
dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

01038088-d332-4d67-9c18-483e81cc4165.name: import-imagej-bioformats
01038088-d332-4d67-9c18-483e81cc4165.description: Imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin

af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

5aafdcbd-80d4-4ddf-8db7-82c7368f3911.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
5aafdcbd-80d4-4ddf-8db7-82c7368f3911.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
